summary.weather: Seoul (Sunday, March 29, 2026: Comfortable spring weather, 10°C to 21°C.)
summary.market: Market Update (Mar 29): Turbulent week; major indices declined. Nasdaq in correction territory. AMZN declined 4.02% to $199.34 amid AI spending concerns. INTC rallied >8% to above $47 post-launch. Capital rotating into defensive sectors (energy, materials, utilities) amid inflation concerns.
summary.art: Art Market (Mar 29): Global market grew 4% to $59.6B in 2025. Auction sales recovery led by focus on provenance and quality. Highlights: Whitney Biennial 2026 (Even Better Than the Real Thing) and the Met's 'Raphael: Sublime Poetry'.

system.raw: Dashboard auto-refresh (4:50 PM): Market rotation to defensive sectors. AMZN $199.34 (-4.02%); INTC >$47 (+8%). Art market seeing 4% global recovery; emphasis on high-quality/provenance.
